regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran-Israel-US conflict dominates the region as massive missile exchanges and Iraqi faction mobilization escalate
bullets: Iran fired its largest missile salvo at central Israel as Israeli forces targeted Iranian government infrastructure and Mianeh.
US-Israeli strikes killed 24 Iranian health workers and five others while the IRGC declared full control over Hormuz.
Iraqi armed factions launched a recruitment drive amid the Iran conflict as security operations continue for an abducted US journalist south of Baghdad.
